items.title: Cops Are Already Using License Plate Readers to Stalk People
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.dek: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.body: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Have World Cup changes made final group stage games unfair?
items.dek: With eight teams already having nothing to play for, has the jeopardy in the group stage at the World Cup been diminished? And are concerns over the integrity o
items.body: With eight teams already having nothing to play for, has the jeopardy in the group stage at the World Cup been diminished? And are concerns over the integrity of competition justified?
items.author: IriLine Desk
